name: Gitlabs: Synelixis Solutions, INGV, VMO Holdings
message: [AI generated] It seems there is a bit of confusion in the request as GitLab, Synelixis Solutions, INGV (National Institute of Geophysics and Volcanology), and VMO Holdings appear to be separate entities. GitLab is a web-based DevOps tool that provides a platform for software development and version control. Synelixis Solutions is an IT company specializing in hardware and software solutions. INGV deals with research in geophysics and volcanology. VMO Holdings is a private holding company.
